title: Realistic Mining
description: Makes Minecraft harder by making resources difficult to obtain.
body:
# Do you feel like Minecraft's a bit to easy?  Do you wish mining was a pain?                                                                                                                       
Well you've come to the right place!                                                                                                                                 
 In Realistic Mining, all stones drop will now drop chunks instead of them selves anymore, but don't worry, these chunks can be crafted into the original block. 
 
Ore blocks such iron ore, gold ore, copper ore (and their deepslate versions), will drop, you guessed it, chunks instead that can be crafted into their original drops. 

What about gems? Good question, gem ores will drop corresponding shards that can be crafted into a corresponding gem. 

Ancient debris will now drop ancient pieces that can be crafted into ancient clumps; that can be smelted netherite scrap.

***Good Luck! :)***

*And yes, you can use this mod in a modpack*

.

*If you like my work, you might be interested in this: [https://modrinth.com/mod/the-prussian-experience](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-prussian-experience)*
